title: ReviewSchema
description: Defines the schema to exchange review related information. [req("exchange.review.schema")]

origin.description: Optional base origin of the reviews in this entry. e.g. specific branch or commit from a git repository

properties.description:
Optional properties related to all reviews in this entry.

**Note:** If a review sets a property key directly, the value set at the review will be taken.

OneOrMultRequirementIds.description: Variant to allow setting either one or more requirement IDs for manual verification.

anyOf.description: Only one requirement is verified by a verification entry.
List of requirements that are all verified by one verification entry.

OverrideCoveredLineInfo.description: Code coverage override of one or more lines. [req("review.coverage")]

comment.description: Mandatory comment explaining the change to the code coverage information.

hits.description: The new number of times the set lines are reached during a test run or test case execution. If None, the line is marked to be ignored from line coverage analysis.

nrs.description: The number of lines affected by this override.

filepath.description: The file whose coverage data is overridden in a review.

lines.description: The line information in the file that is overridden.

OverrideTestCase.description: Represents a test case state override in a review. [req("review.test_case_state", "review.coverage")]

coverage.description: Overrides the code coverage related to this test case. [req("review.coverage")]

name.description: Name of the test case whose state and/or related code coverage is overridden in a review.

state.description: Overrides the state of the test case. [req("review.test_case_state")]

OverrideTestCaseState.description: Represents a test case state override in a review. [req("review.test_case_state")]

comment.description: Mandatory comment explaining why the state is overriden via review.

new.description: The new state that is set with this override.

OverrideTestRun.description: Represents review overrides for a specific test run. [req("review.test_case_state", "review.coverage")]

test_cases.description: List of test case state overrides. [req("review.test_case_state")]

utc_date.description: The UTC date the test run execution started.

Review.description: Defines the fields for a review. [req("exchange.review")]

authors.description: The authors that were part of the review. [req("review.authors")]

properties.description: Optional properties related to this review.

requirements.description: List of requirements that are verified in this review. [req("review.verify_req")]

test_run_overrides.description: List of test run overrides added with this review. [req("review.test_case_state", "review.coverage")]

utc_date.description: The UTC date and time the review was started. [req("review.id")]

TestCaseState.description: Possible states a test case may be in. [req("testcov.test_case.state")]

oneOf.description: Test case was skipped in the related test run.

Test case is in an unknown state.

This likely indicates that a test case did not finish execution, and is treated as *failed* state. [req("testcov.test_case.state.unknown")]

VerifiedRequirementGroup.description: Represents a verification entry affecting one or more requirements. [req("review.verify_req")]

comment.description: Mandatory comment explaining the manual verification.

id.description: One or more requirement IDs to mark the related requirements as manually verified by a review.
